mnemonics: B.A.S.E. Case First: Always define the Base condition to Avoid Stack Overflow Exception.
keyPoints: Every recursive method must have a base case to terminate the recursion.
Each recursive call should move closer to the base case.
Recursion uses the call stack, where each call creates a new stack frame.
commonMistakes: Forgetting the base case, leading to infinite recursion and StackOverflowError.
Not properly defining the recursive step to progress toward the base case.
